description: Single-file Go module with two planted defects, hermetic run. First e2e for the Go image (DHI golang language base: Go pre-baked, plus the layered node toolchain + in-place global eslint pin for JS/TS support). Proves qodana-go builds (base + node + eslint + dist + cli + runtime), loads its Ultimate GoLand profile, and scans a real .go producing SARIF. Driver name + rule ids are NEEDS-PINNING starting guesses — pin from a CI control run and confirm both are enabled in THIS image's default GO (GoLand) profile.

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: the planted capitalized error string `errors.New("Failed to open the thing")` must surface as a Go error-string-format inspection; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate GoLand profile.

STARTING-GUESS id: the planted `unusedHelper` unexported function that is never called must surface as an unused-declaration inspection; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate GoLand profile.
